# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Select target environment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of deployment servers'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip pre-deployment tests'
        )
    }
    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = "artifacts"
        DEPLOY_USER = "deploy"
        DEPLOY_GROUP = "deploy"
    }
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.ARTIFACT_URLS == null || params.ARTIFACT_URLS.trim() == '') {
                        error "ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required"
                    }
                    if (params.DEPLOY_SERVERS == null || params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.trim() == '') {
                        error "DEPLOY_SERVERS parameter is required"
                    }
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    if (urls.size() == 0 || servers.size() == 0) {
                        error "URLs and servers cannot be empty"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    sh "mkdir -p ${env.ARTIFACT_DIR}"
                    for (url in urls) {
                        if (url == null || url.trim() == '') continue
                        def fileName = url.tokenize('/').last()
                        if (fileName == null || fileName.trim() == '') {
                            fileName = "artifact_${System.currentTimeMillis()}"
                        }
                        sh "curl -L --fail -o ${env.ARTIFACT_DIR}/${fileName} ${url}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Validate Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifacts = sh(script: "find ${env.ARTIFACT_DIR} -type f", returnStdout: true).trim().split('\n')
                    if (artifacts.size() == 0) {
                        error "No artifacts found in ${env.ARTIFACT_DIR}"
                    }
                    for (artifact in artifacts) {
                        if (artifact.trim() == '') continue
                        sh "sha256sum ${artifact}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Environment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def artifacts = sh(script: "find ${env.ARTIFACT_DIR} -type f", returnStdout: true).trim().split('\n')
                    def env = params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT
                    
                    for (server in servers) {
                        if (server.trim() == '') continue
                        echo "Deploying to ${server}"
                        for (artifact in artifacts) {
                            if (artifact.trim() == '') continue
                            def fileName = artifact.tokenize('/').last()
                            sh """
                                ssh ${env.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} "mkdir -p /opt/${env}/deploy"
                                scp ${artifact} ${env.DEPLOY_USER}@${server}:/opt/${env}/deploy/${fileName}
                                ssh ${env.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} "chown -R ${env.DEPLOY_USER}:${env.DEPLOY_GROUP} /opt/${env}/deploy"
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Post-Deployment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def env = params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def success = true
                    
                    for (server in servers) {
                        if (server.trim() == '') continue
                        try {
                            sh "ssh ${env.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} 'echo \"Deployment completed on $(date)\"' > /dev/null 2>&1"
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            echo "Failed to verify deployment on ${server}: ${e.message}"
                            success = false
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (!success) {
                        error "Some deployments failed verification"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
        success {
            echo "Deployment successful to ${params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT}"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment failed to ${params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT}"
        }
    }
}
